4 min read
Just now

--

Study help, career writing, business paperwork, content creation, e-commerce listings, and budgeting — all in your browser, none of it asking for your bank password
Press enter or click to view image in full size

One Toolkit. Endless Possibilities.Over the past several months, I’ve been building small, focused AI tools instead of one giant app that tries to do everything. Each one solves a single, specific problem — well. Today I bundled all six of them together, and I want to talk about why they’re built the way they are, because the “why” turned out to matter more than I expected.
The problem with most productivity tools
Most tools in this space fall into one of two categories. Either they’re bloated all-in-one platforms with a steep learning curve and a monthly subscription you forget you’re paying for, or they’re narrow single-purpose apps that demand your email, your bank credentials, or your data before they’ll actually help you.
I wanted neither. So each of these six tools follows the same three rules:
They run entirely in your browser. No account creation, no bank linking, no software to install. Open the file, use the tool, close the tab. Nothing about how you use it gets stored anywhere except locally in your own browser.
They generate output you can actually keep. Not just text you copy and hope you paste somewhere useful — real, usable results tied to what you specifically asked for.
They give you specific, practical answers, not generic advice. If a tool tells you what to do with your money or your resume, it’s working from your actual numbers and your actual situation, not a templated response that could apply to anyone.
I didn’t arrive at these rules in a vacuum, by the way — they came directly from feedback after launching one of these tools, WealthWise AI, on Product Hunt. The comments that meant the most weren’t the compliments; they were the specific, thoughtful requests: “I’d love an exportable monthly summary.” “Browser-based and no bank linking is a relief.” “The suggestions felt practical, not generic.” That feedback became the design standard for everything I build now.
What’s in the bundle
🎓 StudyMind AI — a personal AI study companion. Summarize any topic at your level, generate a quiz with instant scoring, build flashcards, or just ask an AI tutor to explain something you’re stuck on. Works in five languages.
💼 ResumeForge AI — a personal AI career writer. Turn plain descriptions of your work into strong resume bullet points, generate a full cover letter, check your resume against a job posting for missing keywords, or write your LinkedIn About section.
🧾 BizForge AI — a small business paperwork assistant. Generate invoices, write proposals, draft business emails, put together a simple plain-language agreement, or write a social media caption — all from a one-line description of what you need.
🎬 CreatorForge AI — a content creation engine. Get video ideas for your niche, a full script with a hook and call-to-action, ten click-worthy titles, platform-specific captions, or a full 7-day content calendar.
🛍️ ShopCraft AI — an e-commerce listing and marketing assistant. Write a product listing for Etsy, Amazon, Shopify, or Facebook Marketplace, generate SEO-optimized titles, write ad copy, draft a marketing email, or respond to a customer review.
💰 WealthWise AI — a personal finance assistant. Build a budget using the 50/30/20 rule, calculate what you need to save monthly for a goal, get a debt payoff strategy, or ask any money question and get a clear, practical answer.
Every one of these is a single HTML file. No installation, no login screen, no monthly fee eating into your budget every month whether you use it or not.
Why bundle them
Individually, each tool is $14.99. But in practice, most people who need one of these tools end up needing at least one more — a freelancer needs invoices and proposals and probably a budget. A student picking up freelance work needs StudyMind and ResumeForge and BizForge. A content creator running their own shop needs CreatorForge and ShopCraft.
So the six are now available together for $49.99 — about 44% less than buying them one at a time.
Try it for yourself
If any part of your week involves studying, job hunting, running a small business, creating content, selling online, or managing money — which is to say, if you’re a person with a reasonably full life — there’s very likely at least one tool in here that saves you real time starting today.
👉 Check it out here:
https://smartpixelstudio24.gumroad.com/l/TheCompleteAIToolkit
If you try it, I’d genuinely love to hear what’s working and what’s missing. The last round of feedback shaped these tools more than anything I planned, and I expect the next round will too.
